title: iOS App
description: Features, BLE scanning, and local data storage on iPhone and iPad.

sections.body: The Plantgotchi iOS app is built with SwiftUI and gives you full access to your plant data, even when you're offline.

sections.heading: Key Features
sections.body:
• BLE sensor scanning — discover and pair Plantgotchi sensors using CoreBluetooth
  • Real-time readings — moisture, temperature, light, and battery updated every 30–60 seconds
  • Offline-first — all data stored locally in GRDB (SQLite) so the app works without internet
  • Cloud sync — push readings and care logs to Turso when online
  • Care logging — record watering, fertilizing, repotting, pruning, and notes
  • Recommendations — view AI and rule-based care suggestions

sections.heading: BLE Scanning
sections.body:
The app uses CoreBluetooth to scan for devices advertising the Plantgotchi GATT service (0000FE00-...). When a sensor is found, the app connects and subscribes to BLE Notify on all four characteristics (moisture, temperature, light, battery).

The SensorParser handles byte-level parsing: moisture comes as a uint16, temperature as int16 (divided by 100), light as uint32, and battery as uint8. Invalid data is safely discarded.

sections.heading: Local Database
sections.body: The iOS app uses GRDB (a Swift SQLite wrapper) with the same schema as the web and Android apps. Your plants, sensor readings, care logs, and recommendations are all stored locally. The schema includes indexes on (plant_id, timestamp) for fast lookups.

sections.heading: Requirements
sections.body:
• iOS 16 or later
  • Bluetooth permission required for sensor scanning
  • Internet connection needed only for cloud sync and AI recommendations
